case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. VS. MARCUS GONZALES et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2012
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE OF PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (610)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. SERVED SEP-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-02-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-02-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-08-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-08-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT RE: ATTORNEY FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
DECLARATION OF HEATHER ANDRUS IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARCUS AN INDIVIDUAL $4,141.02 PRINCIPAL, $338.46 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,733.42 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,502.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
